description_long: This is a modern, cubic bank building clad in light gray tiles, with a flat roof and a prominent horizontal band near the base displaying the Maybank logo in gold. The front facade features a large, blue-tinted glass window, flanked by a set of smaller, recessed windows on the left. The rest of the building is characterized by a grid of square tiles, giving it a clean, geometric appearance. The gold signage band wraps around the building, providing a visual break between the upper and lower sections. The structure appears solid and robust, with no visible ornamentation aside from the branding. The overall design emphasizes security, simplicity, and corporate identity.
description: A modern, cubic bank building with light gray tiled walls, a flat roof, and a gold Maybank signage band. The front features a large blue-tinted window and smaller recessed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large blue-tinted window, smaller recessed windows on the left, and the gold Maybank signage band.
description_view_1: Side view with tiled walls, the gold signage band, and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain tiled walls and the gold signage band, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with tiled walls and the gold signage band, no windows or doors.
attribute_signage: Gold horizontal band near the base of the building on all sides, displaying the 'Maybank' name and logo in black.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance is implied on the front facade, likely a single or double glass door beneath the large window, integrated into the tiled wall with minimal decorative elements.
